task_completion.description: Verify the product name and description are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Handcrafted Ceramic Mug' in the main title input field and the provided description ('Beautiful handcrafted ceramic mug...') in the main text editor area.

task_completion.description: Verify the product data type is set to Variable Product and the SKU is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Product data' dropdown to ensure 'Variable product' is selected. In the 'Inventory' tab, the SKU field should contain 'HCM-VAR'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct product category is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Product categories' meta box on the right sidebar. The checkbox for 'Accessories' should be checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the Size and Color attributes are created and set to be used for variations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Attributes' tab under Product data, look for 'Size' (with values Small, Large) and 'Color' (with values Ocean Blue, Forest Green). The checkbox 'Used for variations' must be checked for both.

task_completion.description: Verify that 4 variations have been generated from the attributes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Variations' tab under Product data, look for a list of 4 variation rows representing the combinations of Size and Color (e.g., Small - Ocean Blue, Small - Forest Green, Large - Ocean Blue, Large - Forest Green).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Manage Stock' is enabled and the correct prices and stock quantities are set for the variations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at any expanded variation panels. The 'Manage stock?' checkbox should be ticked. Check that Small variations have a Regular Price of '18.00' (Stock: 25 for Ocean Blue, 30 for Forest Green) and Large variations have a Regular Price of '24.00' (Stock: 15 for Ocean Blue, 20 for Forest Green).

task_completion.description: Verify the product has been published.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Publish' meta box on the top right. The status should indicate 'Published', or the primary action button should say 'Update' instead of 'Publish', or a success message 'Product published' should be visible at the top of the screen.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard, not a terminal using WP-CLI or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show standard WooCommerce UI elements like dropdowns, meta boxes, and accordion panels being clicked and filled out, rather than a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Elements/Console tab) open in the screenshots used to manipulate the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: 'Handcrafted Ceramic Mug'. SKU: 'HCM-VAR'. Category: 'Accessories'. Attributes: Size (Small, Large) and Color (Ocean Blue, Forest Green). Variations (4 total): Small/Ocean Blue ($18.00, 25 stock), Small/Forest Green ($18.00, 30 stock), Large/Ocean Blue ($24.00, 15 stock), Large/Forest Green ($24.00, 20 stock).
